summary: Tested BVB.ro dividend scraping feature for FinRomania 2.0. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed BVB.ro data source text and badges are displayed correctly on both /calculator-dividende and /calendar pages. BVB.ro scraper successfully fetched 99 dividend records and 1411 calendar events.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/all — returns 99 dividend records from BVB.ro
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/latest — returns latest dividend per symbol sorted by yield
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/upcoming — returns dividends with ex_date >= today
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/status — shows last_scraped timestamp and record counts
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/trailing/TLV — returns trailing 12M dividend for TLV
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/history/SNP — returns dividend history for SNP
✅ GET /api/dividend-calculator/stocks — shows BVB.ro as data_source for 42 stocks
✅ POST /api/dividend-calculator/calculate — calculates with BVB.ro data (TLV 100, SNP 500)
✅ GET /api/calendar/dividends — shows BVB.ro data_source, upcoming dividends
✅ GET /api/calendar/dividend-kings — shows top yields from BVB.ro data
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/trailing/XXXXX — correctly returns 404 for non-existent symbol
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/history/XXXXX — correctly returns 404 for non-existent symbol
✅ Frontend: /calculator-dividende page shows 'Date oficiale BVB.ro' in header
✅ Frontend: /calculator-dividende 'Acțiuni cu Dividende' tab shows 42 BVB.ro badges
✅ Frontend: /calculator-dividende shows 'Sursa: BVB.ro (oficial)' in stocks table
✅ Frontend: /calendar page shows 'Sursa: BVB.ro (date oficiale)' text
✅ Frontend: /calendar dividend cards show BVB.ro badges
✅ Frontend: /calendar Dividend Kings section shows top yields from BVB.ro
critical_code_review_comments: BVB.ro scraper implementation is well-structured with proper rate limiting (3-5s between requests), user-agent rotation, and MongoDB caching
Scheduler correctly configured to run BVB scrape daily at 7:00 AM Bucharest time
Startup warmup correctly checks if cache is empty before scraping
All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field from responses
Data source priority correctly implemented: BVB.ro (official) > EODHD > Fallback
seed_data_creation: BVB.ro scraper already populated MongoDB with 99 dividend records and 1411 calendar events at startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: BVB.ro dividend scraping feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/bvb-dividends/* for raw scraped data, /api/dividend-calculator/* and /api/calendar/* now use BVB.ro as primary data source. Frontend pages /calculator-dividende and /calendar correctly display 'BVB.ro' source indicators. Scraper runs daily at 7:00 AM Bucharest time via scheduler. Data is cached in MongoDB collections: bvb_dividends_scraped, bvb_calendar_scraped, bvb_scrape_meta.
